testcase.name: test_a4_bidwhist_start
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter118_system_audit.py:64: in test_a4_bidwhist_start assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","partner_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","opponent1_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc" E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_a6_bidwhist_practice_start
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter118_system_audit.py:93: in test_a6_bidwhist_practice_start pytest.fail(f"None worked: {tried}") E Failed: None worked: [('/bid-whist-practice/start', 500), ('/bid-whist/practice/start', 404), ('/practice/bid_whist/start', 404)]

testcase.name: test_a7_practice_start[gin_rummy]
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter118_system_audit.py:103: in test_a7_practice_start assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{game_type} -> {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: gin_rummy -> 400 {"detail":"Game type gin_rummy not supported for practice mode"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_a7_practice_start[war]
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter118_system_audit.py:103: in test_a7_practice_start assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{game_type} -> {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: war -> 400 {"detail":"Game type war not supported for practice mode"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
